title: Chore: Add CI/CD pipeline configuration
original_text: Added a CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions. Created .github/workflows/ci.yml that runs tests on every push and pull request. The pipeline runs on Ubuntu, macOS, and Windows to ensure cross-platform compatibility. Added automated dependency caching to speed up builds. Configured automatic deployment to staging environment on main branch merges. Updated documentation with CI/CD workflow. Result: pipeline runs successfully.
expected_subject: chore(ci): add GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline
expected_body_lines: - Run tests on Ubuntu, macOS, and Windows
- Add dependency caching for faster builds
expected_command: git commit -m "chore(ci): add GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline"
